mapper.select: SELECT id, unit_id, user_id, week_no, status, work_plan, work_content, remark, current_approval_node, current_handler_user_id, current_handler_user_name, current_flow_order, final_approver_user_id, last_return_target, last_return_comment, last_review_by, last_review_by_name, last_review_time, submit_time, approved_time, create_time FROM weekly_work WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND week_no = #{weekNo}

SELECT id, unit_id, user_id, week_no, status, work_plan, work_content, remark, current_approval_node, current_handler_user_id, current_handler_user_name, current_flow_order, final_approver_user_id, last_return_target, last_return_comment, last_review_by, last_review_by_name, last_review_time, submit_time, approved_time, create_time FROM weekly_work WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO weekly_work ( unit_id, user_id, week_no, status, work_plan, work_content, remark, current_approval_node, current_handler_user_id, current_handler_user_name, current_flow_order, final_approver_user_id, last_return_target, last_return_comment, last_review_by, last_review_by_name, last_review_time, approved_time ) VALUES ( #{unitId}, #{userId}, #{weekNo}, #{status}, #{workPlan}, #{workContent}, #{remark}, #{currentApprovalNode}, #{currentHandlerUserId}, #{currentHandlerUserName}, #{currentFlowOrder}, #{finalApproverUserId}, #{lastReturnTarget}, #{lastReturnComment}, #{lastReviewBy}, #{lastReviewByName}, #{lastReviewTime}, #{approvedTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE weekly_work SET status = #{status}, work_plan = #{workPlan}, work_content = #{workContent}, remark = #{remark}, current_approval_node = #{currentApprovalNode}, current_handler_user_id = NULL, current_handler_user_name = NULL, current_flow_order = NULL, final_approver_user_id = NULL, approved_time = NULL, submit_time = NULL WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE weekly_work SET status = #{status}, current_approval_node = #{currentApprovalNode}, current_handler_user_id = #{currentHandlerUserId}, current_handler_user_name = #{currentHandlerUserName}, current_flow_order = #{currentFlowOrder}, final_approver_user_id = #{finalApproverUserId}, last_return_target = NULL, last_return_comment = NULL, last_review_by = NULL, last_review_by_name = NULL, last_review_time = NULL, approved_time = #{approvedTime}, submit_time = #{submitTime} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE weekly_work SET status = #{status}, current_approval_node = #{currentApprovalNode}, current_handler_user_id = #{currentHandlerUserId}, current_handler_user_name = #{currentHandlerUserName}, current_flow_order = #{currentFlowOrder}, final_approver_user_id = #{finalApproverUserId}, last_return_target = #{lastReturnTarget}, last_return_comment = #{lastReturnComment}, last_review_by = #{lastReviewBy}, last_review_by_name = #{lastReviewByName}, last_review_time = #{lastReviewTime}, approved_time = #{approvedTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, weekly_work_id, action, from_node, to_node, reviewer_user_id, reviewer_name, comment, create_time FROM weekly_work_approval_log WHERE weekly_work_id = #{weeklyWorkId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
